decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 7/10 sessions consistent. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 9 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 89/3204 lines reworked (2.8%, 22/50). 0/30 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 5.0% (4/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 68. Session 11: 55 (process:40 efficiency:10 ttfw:5).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 224/224 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
